TextENGNew:
Dear Ritsuko Mamiya
Executive Housing Co., Ltd.
changeReason: New changes company legal designation from "Corporation" to "Co., Ltd." matching the Japanese 株式会社, and removes the Japanese honorific "-sama" from the English text.

TextENGNew: Thank you very much for your continued patronage of our company.
changeReason: Old fabricates "past visits and inquiries to our office" not present in the Japanese ご愛顧 (patronage); new accurately translates the general expression of gratitude for patronage.

TextENGNew: Regarding the property you inquired about, please find our estimate below.

Details
Property Name:  Palace of Versailles, Room 707
Property No.:  14M1421
changeReason: Old translates 記 as "Basic Information" when it means "Details/Record"; also changes "Property Code" to the more accurate "Property No." for 物件番号.

TextENGNew:
Property Type:  New Condominium
Floor Plan:  2LDK
changeReason: Old translates 新築 as "Modern" when it means "newly built/new construction"; this changes the reader's understanding of the property from stylistically modern to recently constructed.

TextENGNew: Location:  2-chome, Koiwa-cho, Shishibone City@rAccess:  Gogura Station, 5 minutes on foot
changeReason: Old fabricates a placeholder 'XXX Line' train line name not in the Japanese.

TextENGNew:
Other:  Southeast corner unit, elevator floor
Fitness club membership within the building included

This property is a luxury condominium located near Gogura Station, an area currently undergoing rapid development. It is an excellent investment, expected to appreciate further as land values in the surrounding area rise.
We have already received inquiries from several times the number of available units.
changeReason: Old vaguely says "many prospective buyers are interested" while the Japanese specifies inquiries exceeding available units by several times (募集数の数倍), a concrete detail conveying much higher demand.

TextENGNew: Please be advised in advance that selection will therefore be carried out by lottery.
We also offer our "Celebrity Member Priority Allocation," which affords significantly greater advantages in the lottery.
Please feel free to contact our representative for further details.

Executive Housing Co., Ltd.
Celebrity Account Manager: Kawabata
changeReason: New changes company legal designation from "Corporation" to "Co., Ltd." matching the Japanese 株式会社.
